groups.title: Upgrade authority — token-owner Safe
groups.note: 3-of-6 Gnosis Safe, replicated per chain. Current owner of every production beacon (power to upgrade all proxies) and holder of every authoriser admin role.

groups.title: Safe signers (3-of-6)
groups.note: Declared in the st0x.deploy constants and checked against the live Safe getOwners() on Base.

groups.title: Operational access — authoriser
groups.note: Every production receipt vault delegates deposit / withdraw / certify authorization to this authoriser.

entries.note: the authorizer() target vaults point at
the V4 upgrade rewires every vault onto this
external service EOA granted deposit / withdraw / certify

groups.title: Historical & bricked
groups.note: Defined in the constants but not live control of production.

entries.note: held the beacons at deploy; ownership since migrated to the Safe
owned by the token contract itself — the V2 beacon can no longer be upgraded
owned by the token contract itself — the V2 beacon can no longer be upgraded
